name: Curse of the Unlucky
entries: As a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can spend 3 Jinx Points to put a pox on a creature cursed by your Evil Eye. Whenever the creature is about to make an attack roll or saving throw, you can roll {@dice 1d4} and subtract the number rolled from the total.
This Misfortune ends when the creature is no longer cursed by your Evil Eye.
